_notes: N_anc values informed by SMC++ Ne(t) estimates (mu=1.8e-8, gen=5yr). Intraspecific acer comparisons use acer FL present Ne (~12,300). Interspecific comparisons use geometric mean of apal and acer FL present Ne: sqrt(28700 * 12300) ~ 18800. These are approximate; treat physical units as order-of-magnitude.
